plan_adherence_notes: The execution did not follow the plan. Diffing this branch against `bcb4082b` shows only `.fleet/tasks/bayes-market-eu0-v2-execute-step-1-execute-step-3/{questions,research,plan}.json` were added; there are no changes in `backend/server.py` or `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py`, so planned steps 1-5 were not implemented. The current backend still has no `build_account_exposure_*` or `ensure_account_exposure_*` helpers and no signed-size/EventTrade exposure sync logic. `pytest -q tests/test_bayes_market_api.py` passes (207 passed), but the planned step-3 regressions were never added.
reason: The research and plan are strong and aligned, but the branch stops at planning artifacts and does not contain the requested implementation or tests. The signed-size helpers, exact-zero deletion/pruning behavior, and EventTrade exposure field updates were not added, so this step is not complete even though the existing Bayes market API tests currently pass.
